name: @metorial/zapier
description: Programmatically manage automated workflows (Zaps) that connect thousands of cloud applications. Browse the app directory, create and configure multi-step Zaps with triggers and actions, manage user authentications for connected apps, retrieve Zap templates, and monitor Zap run history. Create workflow steps with webhook URLs for on-demand action execution. Supports embedded Zap editor integration and pre-filled Zap generation for seamless in-product automation experiences.
